channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Teleprompter operator earned nearly $100K betting on Trump speeches
item.description: Kalshi detected unusual activity on the operator's account, investigated, and referred the case to federal regulators.

item.title: U.S. launches another night of strikes amid ongoing Strait of Hormuz conflict
item.description: Iran warned it would attack all regional infrastructure if President Trump follows through on threats to strike Iranian civilian infrastructure.

item.title: Brazil calls Trump's 25% tariff unjustifiable, plans reciprocal tariffs
item.description: The Brazilian government has condemned a new U.S. tariff on certain Brazilian imports and announced plans to impose reciprocal tariffs.

item.title: Trump takes longer to approve disaster aid, denies Democratic states more often
item.description: Americans face longer waits for disaster aid under President Trump, with delays often stretching weeks or months.
